description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy. Add a build job (stage build) that runs the global before_script `pip install -r requirements.txt` then executes `make all`, stores `full.bib` and `abrv.bib` as artifacts, and runs only for merge_requests and the master branch. Add a test-sort job (stage test) that also runs `pip install -r requirements.txt` then runs `make sort` followed by `git diff --quiet || exit $?`, with the same only rules. Add a deploy-overleaf job (stage deploy) that depends on build and test-sort, runs `pip install -r requirements.txt` then executes the sequence: `git clone https://${OVERLEAF_USER}:${OVERLEAF_TOKEN}@git.overleaf.com/${OVERLEAF_REPO} overleaf`, `cp full.bib overleaf/full.bib`, `cp abrv.bib overleaf/abrv.bib`, `cd overleaf`, and `if ! git diff-index --quiet HEAD; then git -c user.name="gitlab" -c user.email="runner@gilab.com" commit full.bib abrv.bib -m "Update bibliography files"; git push origin master; fi`.
